2606.22419.title: Knowledge-Graph Grounding Helps LLMs Only for Out-of-Training Knowledge: A Controlled Study on Clinical Question Answering
2606.22419.paper_summary: A recent Nature Medicine study reports that general-purpose frontier LLMs outperform specialized retrieval-augmented clinical tools on medical benchmarks, and that retrieval can hurt strong models. We ask the natural follow-up: does structured knowledge-graph (KG) grounding change this, and when does grounding help at all? We contribute two results. First, a reproduction: the study's headline HealthBench score (~88) is the Consensus variant, not full HealthBench, where frontier models and ideal completions both score ~46-47 under a physician-calibrated grader (agreement 82.5%); we reproduce GPT-5.2 Consensus =90.9 and flag a score-deflating grader bug. Second, a knowledge-boundary result. Using a graph+vector engine (samyama-graph) over the public biomedical KG PrimeKG, neither naive triple retrieval nor an agentic natural-language-to-Cypher loop (82% successful queries) improves MedQA across a weak-to-strong model ladder (all |Delta| <= 3.4). On a synthetic counterfactual KG, and on a hybrid benchmark mixing known and novel facts, the identical pipeline lifts out-of-training accuracy from chance to ~100% (+68 to +79) while adding nothing on known facts (a no-LLM arm answers both). Across three regimes (no-knowledge, graph-aided, hybrid), grounding helps only insofar as the decisive fact lies outside the model's training -- public-KG facts are redundant, private and novel data are where it pays -- matching the study's institutional-data caveat.
2606.22419.paper_summary_zh: 最近的一項《自然醫學》研究報告指出，通用前沿LLM在醫學基準測試中表現優於專門的檢索增強臨床工具，並且檢索可能會對強模型造成傷害。我們提出自然的後續問題：結構化知識圖譜（KG）基礎是否會改變這一點，何時基礎會有所幫助？我們提供了兩個結果。首先，是一個重現：該研究的標題HealthBench分數（約88）是共識變體，而不是完整的HealthBench，在這裡前沿模型和理想完成在醫生校準的評分者下的分數均為約46-47（一致性82.5%）；我們重現了GPT-5.2共識=90.9，並標記了一個降低分數的評分者錯誤。其次，是一個知識邊界結果。使用一個圖+向量引擎（samyama-graph）在公共生物醫學KG PrimeKG上，無論是天真的三元檢索還是代理的自然語言到Cypher循環（成功查詢82%）都未能改善MedQA在弱到強模型梯度上的表現（所有|Delta| <= 3.4）。在一個合成的反事實KG上，以及在一個混合已知和新事實的基準上，相同的流程將訓練外的準確性從隨機提升到約100%（+68到+79），而對已知事實沒有任何增益（無LLM臂均可回答）。在三種模式下（無知識、圖輔助、混合），基礎僅在決定性事實位於模型訓練之外時才有幫助——公共KG事實是冗餘的，私有和新數據才是有價值的——這與該研究的機構數據警告相符。
2606.22419.author: Madhulatha Mandarapu et.al.
